nasb.text: As I live,” declares the Lord God, “Sodom, your sister and her daughters have not done as you and your daughters have done.

esv.text: As I live, declares the Lord God, your sister Sodom and her daughters have not done as you and your daughters have done.

cnv.text: 我指著我的永生起誓，你的妹妹所多瑪和她的女兒們，都沒有行過像你和你女兒們所行的事。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我凭我的永恒起誓，与你妹妹所多玛和她女儿们相比，你和你女儿们的行径有过之而无不及。这是主耶和华说的。
